title: Seedream 4.5
description: Generate images using ByteDance Seedream 4.5 via OpenRouter.

userSettings.name: openrouterApiKey
userSettings.label: OpenRouter API Key
userSettings.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Get one at openrouter.ai/keys.

userSettings.name: defaultImageCount
userSettings.label: Default Image Count
userSettings.description: Images per request (1–10). Can be overridden per prompt.

pluginFunctions.code: async function generate_image_seedream(params,userSettings){const{prompt}=params;const apiKey=userSettings.openrouterApiKey;if(!apiKey)throw new Error('OpenRouter API key required.');if(!prompt)throw new Error('Prompt required.');const response=await fetch('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/images',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':`Bearer ${apiKey}`,'HTTP-Referer':window.location.origin||'https://typingmind.com','X-Title':'TypingMind Plugin'},body:JSON.stringify({model:userSettings.model||'bytedance-seed/seedream-4.5',prompt,n:params.n||parseInt(userSettings.defaultImageCount)||1,resolution:params.resolution||'2K',aspect_ratio:params.aspect_ratio||'1:1'})});if(response.status===401)throw new Error('Invalid OpenRouter API key.');if(!response.ok){const text=await response.text();let msg=`Request failed (${response.status})`;try{const e=JSON.parse(text);if(e.error)msg+=`: ${e.error.message||e.error}`;}catch(_){msg+=`: ${text}`;}throw new Error(msg);}const{data}=await response.json();if(!data?.length)throw new Error('No images returned.');return{cards:data.map(img=>({type:'image',image:{url:`data:${img.media_type||'image/jpeg'};base64,${img.b64_json}`,alt:prompt.replace(/[\[\]]/g,''),sync:true}}))}}
pluginFunctions.name: generate_image_seedream

openaiSpec.name: generate_image_seedream

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output image.

openaiSpec.description: Generate images using ByteDance Seedream 4.5 via OpenRouter. Supports 1–10 images per request, resolutions 1K/2K/4K, and aspect ratios including 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:2, and more.

overviewMarkdown:
# Seedream 4.5

Image generation via ByteDance Seedream 4.5 on OpenRouter.

## Parameters
- **n**: 1–10 images per request
- **resolution**: `1K` · `2K` · `4K`
- **aspect_ratio**: `1:1` · `16:9` · `9:16` · `4:3` · `3:2` · and more

## Setup
1. Get an API key at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys)
2. Enter it in plugin settings
